examples: If stricture develops, bouginage will be needed.
Mechanical obstruction may require operation for repair of common bile duct stricture or for gallstones.
Healthy Banks would have to "increase lending above baseline levels", a stricture that could lead to more bad loans.
Over time, if untreated, acid reflux leads to inflammation (esophagitis) and difficulty in swallowing that can cause a partial closing of the lower esophagus (stricture).
NGOs have been told that they can't host events with more than 10 people, a stricture that extends even to annual charity fund raisers for the Persian New Year.
